intro: Strobilanthes khasyana, also known as Khasya, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help in alleviating various health issues including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. Strobilanthes khasyana contains bioactive constituents like alkaloids, glycosides, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
